summary: Comprehensive reference for the NCBI Entrez E-utilities REST API system covering PubMed, PMC, Gene, Protein, Nucleotide and 38+ databases. Documents all nine E-utility endpoints (ESearch, EFetch, EPost, ESummary, ELink, EInfo, EGQuery, ESpell, ECitMatch), the Entrez History Server pattern for large-scale retrieval, and the PMC-specific APIs (ID Converter, OA Web Service, BioC). Critical emphasis on traffic control: rate limits (3 req/s default, 10 req/s with API key), batch size strategies (retmax/retstart iteration, EPost+EFetch pipeline), exponential backoff for 429/502/503 errors, off-peak scheduling, and HTTP POST for >200 UIDs. Includes production-ready Python client with Biopython integration patterns.
ki_name: NCBI PubMed & E-utilities REST API — Rate Limiting, Batch Retrieval, and Traffic Control
